summary: Fix underwriting-service scaffold structure and naming inconsistencies
description:
The underwriting-service scaffold has three structural problems that must be resolved before data layer work begins:

1. Nested directory: all service content lives at backend/underwriting-service/underwriting-service/ instead of backend/underwriting-service/
2. Profile file extension: application-dev.yml and application-prod.yml use .yml while every other service in the repository uses .yaml
3. Package name: com.loanflow.underwriting_service uses an underscore, which is non-standard Java package naming — should be com.loanflow.underwritingservice

Additionally, application.yaml contains only spring.application.name with no management or actuator configuration, which must be added to match the expected baseline.

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Service content is at the correct directory level
acceptanceCriteria.then: all underwriting-service files (pom.xml, mvnw, src/) exist directly under backend/underwriting-service/ with no nested underwriting-service subdirectory
application.yaml, application-dev.yaml, and application-prod.yaml all use the .yaml extension and no .yml files remain

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Package name follows standard Java conventions
acceptanceCriteria.then: all classes use the package com.loanflow.underwritingservice with no underscore

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Service starts with actuator health endpoint responding
acceptanceCriteria.when: mvnw spring-boot:run is executed from backend/underwriting-service
acceptanceCriteria.then: GET /actuator/health returns a 200 response with full health details

tasks.summary: Move service content out of nested directory
tasks.description:
Move all files and directories from backend/underwriting-service/underwriting-service/ up one level to backend/underwriting-service/. After the move, the following should exist directly under backend/underwriting-service/:

- pom.xml
- mvnw / mvnw.cmd
- .mvn/
- src/
- .gitattributes
- .gitignore

Delete the now-empty inner underwriting-service/ directory. Verify the Maven build still resolves from backend/underwriting-service/.

Rename the following files in src/main/resources:

- application-dev.yml → application-dev.yaml
- application-prod.yml → application-prod.yaml

Create src/test/resources/application-test.yaml as an empty stub. Verify no references to .yml filenames remain in pom.xml or any configuration.

tasks.summary: Fix package name from com.loanflow.underwriting_service to com.loanflow.underwritingservice
tasks.description:
Rename the Java package across all source files:

- Rename directory src/main/java/com/loanflow/underwriting_service/ to src/main/java/com/loanflow/underwritingservice/
- Update the package declaration in UnderwritingServiceApplication.java
- Rename directory src/test/java/com/loanflow/underwriting_service/ to src/test/java/com/loanflow/underwritingservice/
- Update the package declaration in UnderwritingServiceApplicationTests.java

Verify mvnw test passes after the rename.

tasks.summary: Add actuator and logging configuration to application.yaml
tasks.description:
Expand application.yaml beyond spring.application.name to include the management and logging baseline, consistent with other services in the repository:

spring:
  application:
    name: underwriting-service

management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health, info, metrics
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: always

logging:
  level:
    root: INFO
    com.loanflow: DEBUG
